violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
Establishment was observed storing cooked chicken in cardboard boxes. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The dish machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Establishment has a service call in for dishwasher. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink to sanitize until the dish machine is repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2025

The 3 door beverage cooler in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Establishment is limited to store only non TCS foods in unit (foods that do not require refrigeration for food safety). New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2026
Cardboard was observed lined on walk-in cooler shelves. This material is not easily cleanable. PIC informed to cease practice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
The floor and ceiling in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

The dish machine located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Establishment has a service call in for dishwasher. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink to sanitize until the dish machine is repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door reach-in fan have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
The floor and ceiling in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to sanitize in the 3-bay sink until the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher is able to reach the proper sanitizer concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

Various foods in the walk-in cooler were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the 1 door reach in and the hood system have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/13/2024
The floor and ceiling in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2025
